title: Quality Cost PAF Calculator
description: Calculates Prevention, Appraisal, and Failure (PAF) costs based on ISO 9001, Lean, and Six Sigma principles to identify quality cost drivers and improvement opportunities.

inputs.label: Total Sales Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Annual total sales revenue used as a baseline for cost ratio calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual total sales revenue used as a baseline for cost ratio calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyet oranı hesaplamaları için temel olarak kullanılan yıllık toplam satış geliri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Gesamtumsatz als Basis für Kostenverhältnisberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel total des ventes utilisé comme base pour les calculs de ratio de coût.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos anuales totales por ventas utilizados como base para los cálculos de ratios de costos.

inputs.label: Prevention Training Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs for quality training, process planning, and preventive maintenance.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de formation à la prévention

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs for quality training, process planning, and preventive maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite eğitimi, süreç planlaması ve önleyici bakım maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Qualitätsschulung, Prozessplanung und vorbeugende Wartung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts de formation qualité, planification des processus et maintenance préventive.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos de capacitación en calidad, planificación de procesos y mantenimiento preventivo.

inputs.label: Prevention Design/Process Control Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs for FMEA, design reviews, and process control implementation.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de conception/contrôle des processus de prévention
label_i18n.es: Costo de diseño/control de procesos de prevención

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs for FMEA, design reviews, and process control implementation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: FMEA, tasarım incelemeleri ve süreç kontrol uygulama maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für FMEA, Design-Reviews und Prozesskontrollimplementierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts pour l'AMDEC, les revues de conception et la mise en œuvre du contrôle des processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes de AMFE, revisiones de diseño e implementación de control de procesos.

inputs.label: Appraisal Inspection & Testing Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs for incoming, in-process, and final inspection and testing.

label_i18n.es: Coste de inspección y pruebas de evaluación

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs for incoming, in-process, and final inspection and testing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen, süreç içi ve son muayene ve test maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Wareneingangs-, Zwischen- und Endprüfung sowie Tests.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts d'inspection et d'essai à la réception, en cours et en fin de processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes de inspección y pruebas de entrada, en proceso y finales.

inputs.label: Appraisal Audit & Calibration Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs for internal/external audits and equipment calibration.

label_i18n.es: Coste de auditoría y calibración de evaluación

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs for internal/external audits and equipment calibration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İç/dış denetimler ve ekipman kalibrasyonu maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für interne/externe Audits und Gerätekalibrierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts des audits internes/externes et de l'étalonnage des équipements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes de auditorías internas/externas y calibración de equipos.

inputs.label: Internal Failure Scrap & Rework Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs of scrap, rework, and downtime due to defects before delivery.

label_i18n.tr: İç Başarısızlık Fire ve Yeniden İşleme Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût des rebuts et reprises dus aux défaillances internes
label_i18n.es: Coste de desperdicio y retrabajo por fallos internos

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs of scrap, rework, and downtime due to defects before delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teslimattan önce kusurlardan kaynaklanan fire, yeniden işleme ve duruş maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Ausschuss, Nacharbeit und Stillstand aufgrund von Fehlern vor Auslieferung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts des rebuts, reprises et temps d'arrêt dus à des défauts avant livraison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes de desperdicio, retrabajo y tiempo de inactividad debido a defectos antes de la entrega.

inputs.label: Internal Failure Downtime Cost
inputs.businessContext: Lost production time due to quality issues.

label_i18n.fr: Coût des temps d'arrêt dus aux défaillances internes
label_i18n.es: Coste de tiempo de inactividad por fallos internos

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost production time due to quality issues.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite sorunları nedeniyle kaybedilen üretim süresi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de production perdu en raison de problèmes de qualité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de producción perdido debido a problemas de calidad.

inputs.label: External Failure Warranty & Returns Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs for warranty claims, returns, and replacements after delivery.

label_i18n.tr: Dış Başarısızlık Garanti ve İade Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût des garanties et retours dus aux défaillances externes
label_i18n.es: Coste de garantía y devoluciones por fallos externos

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs for warranty claims, returns, and replacements after delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teslimattan sonra garanti talepleri, iadeler ve değişim maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Garantieansprüche, Retouren und Ersatz nach Auslieferung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts des réclamations sous garantie, retours et remplacements après livraison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes de reclamaciones de garantía, devoluciones y reemplazos después de la entrega.

rules.message: Prevention costs should not exceed 10% of total sales.
Appraisal costs should not exceed 15% of total sales.
Failure costs should not exceed 20% of total sales.
Total quality cost should not exceed 30% of total sales.

thresholds.alert: Failure costs exceed 10% of sales. Immediate improvement actions recommended.
Prevention costs are below 1% of sales. Increase investment in preventive activities.
Appraisal costs are high relative to sales. Consider shifting to prevention.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
